title: GDPR Compliance on Pro Plan
excerpt: Client has 170 users on Pro Plan and is wondering if they can only become GDPR compliant by moving and upgrading to Enterprise since their data resides outside EU. Is there another way to become GDPR compliant without mo…

posts.author: Tooba (Tooba Ahmed)
posts.cookedHtml: Client has 170 users on Pro Plan and is wondering if they can only become GDPR compliant by moving and upgrading to Enterprise since their data resides outside EU. Is there another way to become GDPR compliant without move to Enterprise?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Tooba,

monday.com is GDPR compliant, regardless of the plan you’re on.

Please reference the 2 articles below for more information:

  • monday.com and GDPR

  • monday.com and the GDPR - monday.com Legal Portal

Do you let me know if this answers your question
